description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical bottle with a smooth, glossy surface and a muted green color dominating its body. The bottle features a beige screw cap at the top, which appears tightly sealed. On the front, there is a rectangular label with a black and gold color scheme, displaying a decorative emblem and some text, suggesting it may be an alcoholic beverage or specialty drink. The label is vertically oriented and centrally placed, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise simple design. The bottle's body is seamless and unblemished, with no visible signs of damage or wear. Its overall appearance is clean, modern, and suitable for display or use in urban environments such as restaurants, bars, or shops.
description: A tall, glossy green bottle with a beige screw cap and a decorative black and gold label on the front. The design is sleek and unblemished, giving it a modern, elegant look.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a smooth, uninterrupted green surface with no label or markings.
description_view_1: The front view displays the decorative black and gold label, centrally placed on the green bottle, and the beige screw cap.
description_view_2: The side of the bottle is shown, with the edge of the label just visible, highlighting the bottle's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: The opposite side to the label is visible, showing a plain green surface and the beige cap.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular black and gold label with a decorative emblem and some text, centrally placed on the front of the bottle.
